summary: Merchant PIN Security & Admin Management testing completed. Fixed 2 critical backend bugs and verified all features. Backend: 20/20 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All UI components verified working.

bugs_fixed_by_testing_agent.issue: verify_otp() function was called with 3 arguments but it was an endpoint that takes 1 (VerifyOTPRequest). Created verify_otp_helper() async function for internal PIN verification.
bugs_fixed_by_testing_agent.fix: Added verify_otp_helper() function and replaced calls in set_settings_pin and reset_settings_pin

bugs_fixed_by_testing_agent.issue: create_jwt_token() function doesn't exist - should be create_token()
get_current_admin searched only by username but tokens were created with email. This caused 'Admin not found' for newly created admins.
bugs_fixed_by_testing_agent.fix: Updated get_current_admin to search by both username OR email

seed_data_creation: Used existing test merchant (0000000000, TestPass123) and super admin. Test OTP: 0000 with request_id: test_request_id
context_for_next_testing_agent: Merchant PIN system fully working. Merchant has PIN set (9876). Admin Management Panel working. Super admin can create/delete/change roles of other admins. Current admins: emileparfait2003@gmail.com (super_admin), test_admin (admin).

merchant_pin_apis: POST /api/sdm/merchant/settings/set-pin - PASS (validates PIN format, OTP, stores hash)
POST /api/sdm/merchant/settings/verify-pin - PASS (returns settings_token, locks after 5 failures)
admin_management_apis: GET /api/admin/profile - PASS (returns id, username, email, role, permissions)
POST /api/admin/change-password - PASS (own password or super_admin reset)
PUT /api/admin/{id}/role - PASS (super_admin only, cannot change own role)
DELETE /api/admin/{id} - PASS (super_admin only, cannot delete self or other super_admin)
frontend_ui: Merchant Dashboard Settings tab - PIN lock/unlock form visible
PIN input field with 4-6 digit validation
Forgot PIN? Reset via OTP link
Admin & Security panel with current admin profile
Admin Accounts table with role dropdowns
Reset Password and Delete buttons for other admins
